iteration_history.approach: Verbose SKILL.md with JSON templates and rules, using write tool
iteration_history.issue: qwen3-30b truncates closing brace in JSON when using write tool

iteration_history.approach: Concise SKILL.md, still using write tool
iteration_history.issue: Same truncation issue — model consistently drops final } in JSON

iteration_history.approach: Instructed model to use bash printf instead of write tool
iteration_history.issue: Apostrophes in reasoning strings (e.g. today's) break bash single-quoted strings; also malformed nested JSON braces

iteration_history.approach: Instructed model to write Python scripts to generate JSON
iteration_history.issue: Model generates 200+ line Python with truncated f-strings (missing closing braces), gets stuck in edit loop trying to fix

iteration_history.approach: Provided pre-written Python helper scripts in skill directory; SKILL.md just tells model to run them

key_insight: qwen3-30b consistently truncates closing delimiters (}, ]) in long generated strings — whether JSON content, bash commands, or Python code. The only reliable approach is to provide pre-built helper scripts that handle all output generation, so the model only needs to invoke them.
changes_made: Rewrote SKILL.md to be minimal — just instructions to run helper scripts
Added generate_schedule.py — reads input.json, creates daily_plan.json with time-blocked schedule
Added generate_priorities.py — reads tasks.json, creates priority_report.json with categorized tasks
